positive: A stylized and whimsical depiction of a friendly astronaut floating among geometric neon planets and cosmic dust. The astronaut, drawn with clean lines and a slightly retro-futuristic aesthetic, is giving a thumbs-up. The composition should be centrally focused, emphasizing the astronaut and the vibrant, contrasting planetary elements. Use a palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, magenta, and highly saturated golds for the neon glow. Style should be vector art combined with low-poly 3D rendering, designed for maximum contrast and print readability on apparel. Perfect silhouette, high detail, sharp edges, centralized composition, minimalist cosmic elements.
